# Admin Panel

> A reusable, embeddable CMS admin for Next.js sites. This repository contains shared admin UI, APIs, setup wizard, design-pack tooling, and automation primitives.

## Purpose
- Provide a clean, host-agnostic admin panel that can be installed into any site
- Manage CMS pages, media, settings, forms, SEO, themes, users, backups, and integrations
- Support first-run setup, MFA, and secure role-based access

## Core paths
- /admin/login
- /admin/setup
- /admin/dashboard

## APIs (examples)
- /api/cms/pages
- /api/cms/media
- /api/cms/settings
- /api/cms/forms
- /api/cms/seo

## Notes for AI agents
- Do not assume any specific company/domain content
- Treat this project as a generic platform, not a preloaded business website
- Prefer environment-driven defaults (site URL, site name, contact values)
